2605.08024.title: MPD$^2$-Router: Mask-aware Multi-expert Prior-regularized Dual-head Deferral Router in Glaucoma Screening and Diagnosis
2605.08024.paper_summary: Learning-to-defer (L2D) can make glaucoma screening safer by routing difficult/uncertain cases to humans, yet standard formulations overlook expert availability, heterogeneous readers behavior, workload imbalance, asymmetric diagnostic harm, case difficulty from morphology and deployment shift. We introduce MPD$^2$-Router, a mask-aware multi-expert deferral framework that recasts ophthalmic triage as constrained human--AI routing: whether to defer and to which available expert. It couples a dual-head deferral/allocation policy with mask-aware Gumbel--sigmoid gating that strictly enforces per-sample availability, and fuses uncertainty, morphology, image-quality, and OOD signals. Training uses an asymmetric cost-sensitive objective with an augmented-Lagrangian deferral budget, a group-specific distribution prior, and a rank-majorization JS regularizer that jointly prevent expert collapse without forcing uniform allocation. Across three cross-national glaucoma cohorts (REFUGE, CHAKSU, ORIGA) with a frozen REFUGE-trained backbone, MPD$^2$-Router substantially lowers clinical cost and improves MCC over AI-only at a moderate deferral rate. It is Pareto-optimal in F1--MCC--cost, robust under cross-domain shift, and yields balanced expert utilization.
2605.08024.paper_summary_zh: 學習延遲 (L2D) 可以透過將困難/不確定的案例轉交給人類來使青光眼篩檢更安全，然而標準的公式忽略了專家的可用性、異質的讀者行為、工作負載不平衡、不對稱的診斷傷害、形態學帶來的案例難度以及部署轉變。我們介紹了 MPD$^2$-Router，一個具備掩碼感知的多專家延遲框架，將眼科分診重新詮釋為受限的人類--AI 路由：是否延遲以及轉交給哪位可用專家。它將雙頭延遲/分配政策與掩碼感知的 Gumbel--sigmoid 閘結合，嚴格執行每個樣本的可用性，並融合不確定性、形態學、圖像質量和 OOD 信號。訓練使用不對稱的成本敏感目標，搭配增強拉格朗日延遲預算、特定群體的分佈先驗，以及一個排名最大化的 JS 正則化器，這些共同防止專家崩潰而不強迫均勻分配。在三個跨國青光眼隊列 (REFUGE、CHAKSU、ORIGA) 中，使用一個凍結的 REFUGE 訓練骨幹，MPD$^2$-Router 顯著降低臨床成本，並在中等延遲率下改善 MCC，相較於僅使用 AI 的情況。它在 F1--MCC--成本上是帕累托最優的，對跨領域轉變具有穩健性，並實現了平衡的專家利用率。
2605.08024.author: Wenxin Zhan et.al.
